recent_projects.name: fhircraft
recent_projects.summary: Fhircraft transforms FHIR (Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources) specifications into type-safe Python models using Pydantic. Build healthcare applications with automatic validation, intelligent code completion, and seamless integration with Python's ecosystem.

recent_bad_license_projects.name: dwcahandler
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: Python package to handle Darwin Core Archive (DwCA) operations. This includes creating a DwCA zip file from one or more csvs, reading a DwCA, merge two DwCAs, validate DwCA and delete records from DwCA based on one or more key columns
